TERMINAL HACKSIM browser α 

      

      

        >
        
      

      

        Sound: terminal keystrokes use built-in Web Audio (no sample files). Optional Fallout-style UI
        (selection / browse / click): drop ui_select.wav, ui_browse.wav,
        ui_click.wav in /sounds/fallout_terminal/ or use built-in synth.
        Node: npm start. Step history (after clears): Alt+PgUp / Alt+PgDn for previous / next command output.
